name: royal anteroom
hints: There is a useful container here. Take it - you will need it later.
The empty wine bladder can be used to collect swamp gas from the swamp (room 1).
GET BLADDER. Go UP to reach the royal chamber, or NORTH to return to the large cavern.
notes: Contains the empty wine bladder needed to collect swamp gas. Connects to the large cavern (N/room 7) and the royal chamber (U/room 20).
